lessons.title: Are you American?
lessons.description: Sam meets a border agent at the airport and is questioned by him.
lessons.descriptionFr: Sam rencontre un agent à la frontière à l'aéroport.

lessons.title: I'm Jordanian.
lessons.description: Sam takes a taxi from Queen Rania airport to his uncle's house in Amman.
lessons.descriptionFr: Sam prend un taxi de l'aéroport Queen Rania jusqu'à chez son oncle à Amman.

lessons.title: At the market
lessons.description: Shopping at a local souk in Cairo.
lessons.descriptionFr: Faire ses courses dans un souk local au Caire.

lessons.title: Family gathering
lessons.description: A typical family visit during Eid celebration.
lessons.descriptionFr: Une visite familiale typique pendant les célébrations de l'Aïd.
